title: BEM-535.3 provider adapter failover
objective:
Run script:
"""
wf = Path('.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml')
archive = Path('governance/archive/bem535_3_provider_adapter_failover_20260517')
archive.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report = Path('governance/reports/bem535_3_provider_adapter_failover.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proof = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem535_3_provider_adapter_failover.txt')
proof.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

if wf.exists():
    old = archive / '.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml'
    old.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    old.write_text(wf.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    changed_files.append(str(old))

wf_text = '''name: Provider Adapter

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      cycle_id:
        description: Internal role cycle id
        required: true
        type: string
      provider:
        description: claude or gpt
        required: true
        type: string
      role:
        description: analyst, auditor, executor, curator
        required: true
        type: string
      status:
        description: completed, failed, cancelled, timeout, missing_result_after_ttl
        required: true
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  adapt:
    name: Provider Adapter with Claude primary -> GPT reserve failover
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Append provider adapter result and failover decision
        shell: bash
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PY'
          import json
          from pathlib import Path
          cycle_id = '${{ inputs.cycle_id }}'
          provider = '${{ inputs.provider }}'
          role = '${{ inputs.role }}'
          status = '${{ inputs.status }}'
          reserve_signals = ['failed', 'cancelled', 'timeout', 'missing_result_after_ttl']
          selected_provider = provider
          failover_applied = False
          switch_reason = None
          if provider == 'claude' and status in reserve_signals:
              selected_provider = 'gpt'
              failover_applied = True
              switch_reason = 'claude_' + status
          blocker = None if status == 'completed' else {'code': 'PROVIDER_' + status.upper(), 'message': 'provider adapter observed ' + status}
          record = {
            'record_type': 'provider_adapter_result',
            'cycle_id': cycle_id,
            'source': 'internal',
            'provider': provider,
            'selected_provider': selected_provider,
            'reserve_provider': 'gpt',
            'failover_applied': failover_applied,
            'switch_reason': switch_reason,
            'from_role': role,
            'to_role': 'curator',
            'status': status,
            'artifact_path': 'governance/transport/results.jsonl',
            'commit_sha': None,
            'blocker': blocker,
            'created_at': 'workflow_runtime'
          }
          path = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
          path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
          with path.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
              f.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False) + '\\n')
          state_path = Path('governance/state/provider_contour_state.json')
          state = json.loads(state_path.read_text()) if state_path.exists() else {}
          state['updated_at'] = 'workflow_runtime'
          state['last_provider'] = provider
          state['selected_provider'] = selected_provider
          state['last_status'] = status
          state['last_switch_reason'] = switch_reason
          hist = state.get('switch_history', [])
          if failover_applied:
              hist.append({'cycle_id': cycle_id, 'from': 'claude', 'to': 'gpt', 'reason': switch_reason, 'at': 'workflow_runtime'})
          state['switch_history'] = hist
          state['blocker'] = None
          state_path.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\\n')
          PY
      - name: Commit provider adapter result
        shell: bash
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/transport/results.jsonl governance/state/provider_contour_state.json
          git commit -m "Provider adapter failover result ${{ inputs.cycle_id }}" || echo "No changes"
          git push
'''
wf.write_text(wf_text)

checks = {
  'workflow_dispatch': 'workflow_dispatch' in wf_text,
  'no_schedule': 'schedule:' not in wf_text,
  'claude_primary': "provider == 'claude'" in wf_text,
  'gpt_reserve': "selected_provider = 'gpt'" in wf_text,
  'failure_signals': all(x in wf_text for x in ['failed','cancelled','timeout','missing_result_after_ttl']),
  'transport_write': 'governance/transport/results.jsonl' in wf_text,
  'state_write': 'governance/state/provider_contour_state.json' in wf_text,
  'no_openai_api_key': 'OPENAI_API_KEY' not in wf_text,
  'no_issue_comment': 'issue_comment' not in wf_text
}
ok = all(checks.values())
report.write_text('# BEM-535.3 | Provider Adapter Failover Implementation | ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:15 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- provider-adapter.yml обновлён.\n- Claude primary failed/cancelled/timeout/missing_result_after_ttl -> GPT reserve.\n- Решение пишется в transport и provider_contour_state.\n- No schedule trigger.\n- No secrets / no paid API.\n\n## Checks\n```json\n' + json.dumps(checks, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n```\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if ok else 'provider adapter failover validation failed') + '\n')
proof.write_text('BEM-535.3 ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + ': provider-adapter failover implemented. checks=' + json.dumps(checks, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n')
changed_files.extend([str(wf), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-535.3 implemented provider-adapter Claude->GPT reserve failover')
"""
No issue comments.
